title: Dasavaikalika Sutra: Ten Chapters on Religious Life
description: The Jain monastic manual: rules for monks on non-violence, speech, food, and the conquest of the passions.
introduction: The Jain monastic manual: rules for monks on non-violence, speech, food, and the conquest of the passions.

translation.text: A monk should speak only after careful thought. A monk should eat only what is freely given. A monk should harm no living thing.
